body_txt: A Sub-Trope of Show Within a Show . When a Soap Opera is depicted in works from another genre, it is nearly always done as an over-the-top parody of the genre or at least as a quick portrayal of cliched forms of its tropes, including (but by no means limited to) :  At least one character in the main cast will be a regular viewer of the show , and likely be forced to explain it .
